ayahEnglish: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -
Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
Let them worship the Lord of this House,

targetTranslation: The one who/which (describes feeding them and giving them safety)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
ayahEnglish: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.

targetTranslation: he fed them (referring to the people of Quraysh)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
ayahEnglish: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
ayahEnglish: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
ayahEnglish: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.
